title: Freight Settlement Readiness
summary: Settlement requires complete execution and accurate pricing structures.
fullContent: Freight settlement orchestration depends on status progression, charge completeness, and finance integration controls.
importantPoints: Confirm all charge lines are calculated
consultantNotes: Use charge trace and status snapshots in troubleshooting workshops
realWorldExamples: A project reduced settlement failures by adding status gate validation
interviewQuestions: How do you debug settlement block reasons quickly?
